tasks.spec: Create alpha.txt in the current working directory containing exactly: alpha ready. Do not write any other files.
tasks.check: test "$(cat alpha.txt 2>/dev/null)" = "alpha ready" || { echo 'FAIL: alpha.txt missing or content is not alpha ready'; exit 1; }
tasks.verified: alpha.txt exists and contains exactly the expected line — the built-in demo's alpha task, served through Feeder
